final_text:
The correct mapping based on typical dipole arrangements in the absence of an external field is:  
- Ferromagnetism: aligned parallel (P)  
- Antiferromagnetism: alternating opposite (Q)  
- Diamagnetism: no permanent dipoles (R)  
- Paramagnetism: random dipoles (S)  

This matches option (B).  

[ANSWER]B[/ANSWER]
